headline: UBS Bullish on The Trade Desk (TTD) Despite Its 50% One-Year Decline: See Why
summary: With $864.15 million invested by billionaires, The Trade Desk, Inc. (NASDAQ:TTD) earns a place among the best dip stocks according to billionaires. The stock is down more than 50% over the past year as of April 22, 2026. Still, analysts remain bullish on The Trade Desk, Inc. (NASDAQ:TTD), with 49% of covering analysts maintaining “Buy” […]
